channel.title: 27zero — EdTech Marketing Insights
channel.description: The world's only EdTech-exclusive marketing agency. Turning purpose into brand power since 2001.

item.title: A Web Documentary Unveiling Latin America's Unsung Educational Heroes Anthology - Marketing Programs
item.description: The goal was to inspire, connect, and generate curiosity within the EdTech community.
item.author: hello@27zero.agency (27zero)

item.title: How EdTech Companies Can Generate More Qualified Pipeline
item.description: How EdTech Companies Can Generate More Qualified Pipeline
item.author: hello@27zero.agency (27zero)

item.title: A Web Documentary Unveiling Latin America's Unsung Educational Heroes Anthology - Marketing Programs
item.description:
The brief The Antología project brief was to create an inspiring marketing initiative to strengthen Latam partnerships and meet key business goals for the coming year. Watch the video
Challenge The primary challenge was to unify multiple teams and stakeholders to visualize and understand the benefits of the project. Additionally, with only four months to schedule and eleven months to execute, the project required meticulous planning and coordination to ensure timely delivery and high-quality production.
item.author: hello@27zero.agency (27zero)
